svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial
svg.title: Qwen3-Next layer stack with two cache planes: KV plane for attention, state plane for gated DeltaNet
svg.desc: A schematic showing a Qwen3-Next layer stack alongside two parallel cache planes. The layer stack on the left is drawn as twelve horizontal blocks alternating in a 3:1 ratio of pale lavender gated DeltaNet linear-attention blocks and pale teal full softmax-attention blocks. Lavender blocks are annotated with a small purple square representing a fixed-size recurrent state matrix S of shape head dim by head dim. Teal blocks are annotated with a horizontal strip of teal cells representing one KV cache entry per token. To the right two cache planes are drawn. The KV plane shows tokens stacked vertically with KV cells filled at every position. The state plane shows the same token range with sparse purple checkpoint markers at fixed 1024-token boundaries, each holding a snapshot of S. At the bottom a timeline compares the second-turn prefill cost. The KV-plane-only timeline is a long red bar of 27 seconds of full re-prefill. The KV-plus-state-plane timeline is a short green bar of 0.4 seconds of partial replay from the nearest checkpoint.
svg.text: Qwen3-Next: two cache planes for one layer stack
3:1 hybrid layer pattern · gated DeltaNet carries a fixed-size recurrent state · full attention carries per-token KV

g.text: 3:1 ratio · 36 linear / 12 attention in a 48-layer stack
one entry per token per attention layer
dense per-token KV · radix-tree-keyed prefix match works
snapshot of S every 4096 tokens per linear layer
Second-turn prefill cost on Radeon AI PRO R9700, 4,800-token prefix
27.0 s · full re-prefill of every linear layer
0.4 s · partial replay from nearest 4096-tok checkpoint
